description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on every push to main, on pull requests, and when a repository is created. Use a matrix job strategy to test across multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10) and operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, macos-10.15). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version with pip caching, install dependencies, build the project, and run tests in both C extension and pure Python fallback environments.
